title: Fix serverless exam submission - eliminate cross-request DB dependency
description: On Vercel serverless, /tmp SQLite is not shared between requests. The submit endpoint fails with 'Exam not found' because it looks up an exam_id in a DB that no longer exists. Fix: embed correct answers, topics, and candidate info as hidden form fields, score from form data, and render results directly.
acceptance_criteria: Hidden inputs added for correct_answer, topic, total_questions, candidate info
Form action changed to /exam/submit (no exam_id needed)
get_questions selects from in-memory QUESTION_BANK instead of DB
submit_exam scores entirely from form data hidden fields
submit_exam renders exam_result.html directly instead of redirecting
All existing tests pass or are updated appropriately
findings: The _schedule_followup function opens its own DB connection, so it must be called outside any existing with get_db() block to avoid 'database is locked' errors. All 37 tests pass.
